56363869.title: Adam Edelman
56363869.extract: Adam Jeremy "A. J." Edelman  (Hebrew: אדם ג'רמי אדלמן; born March 14, 1991) is an American-born Israeli sliding sports athlete. He is the first Israeli to qualify for the Olympics in two different sports. Edelman competed for Israel in the skeleton competition at the 2018 Winter Olympics in Pyeongchang, South Korea, and competed at the Milan 2026 Olympics in the bobsleigh, where his four-man team was suspended from the competition after a team member lied about being ill. Edelman is the first Orthodox Jew to compete in the Winter Olympics, and the first Orthodox Jewish man to compete in either Olympic iteration. He became the first ever Israeli to take a podium in a sanctioned bobsled race in 2023 and became the first Israeli to secure the overall podium on the North American Cup in March 2024.
